positive: A highly detailed, minimalist celestial creature design, combining the elegance of a stylized owl silhouette with geometric, bioluminescent forest elements. The creature should be rendered in clean, sharp lines, appearing as a vibrant, ethereal decal against a deep midnight blue gradient background. The composition is perfectly centered, utilizing strong contrast between the luminous gold and teal highlights and the dark background. Incorporate subtle, repeating mandala patterns of stylized leaves and constellations forming an organic, intricate border. The style should be neo-art nouveau mixed with cosmic vaporwave aesthetics, maximizing legibility and pop on fabric. Studio lighting setup, vector quality, isolated subject.
negative: blurry, deformed, noise, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, watermark, low detail, poor composition, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, amateur, cartoonish
